name: FOODWAYS LLC
address: 50 SE SCOTT ST STE 22, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response efficiency on the property could involve installing additional access points, which may facilitate quicker and more direct routes for emergency vehicles and personnel. Clear demarcation of the vehicle parking area and pedestrian walkways can reduce potential obstructions and conflicts, promoting smoother navigation and maneuvering for emergency responders. Maintaining pedestrian walkways and sidewalks clear of obstacles could assist in allowing emergency personnel to traverse the area effectively. Considering designated staging areas within the landscaped section might support the strategic placement of emergency equipment and personnel. By implementing these measures, responders could experience improved access and maneuverability throughout the property, potentially enhancing the overall effectiveness of emergency operations.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing the separation between the scattered trees and the structure could improve defensible space and help to reduce potential fuel continuity around the property. Managing the vegetation adjacent to the structure by pruning, trimming, and thinning could reduce the chances of direct flame contact and radiant heat exposure. Establishing and maintaining a clear defensible space by removing ladder fuels and reducing excess shrubbery in close proximity to the building may support effective firefighting efforts. Sustaining these efforts to manage the density of vegetation and maintain open areas around the property would contribute to long-term wildfire resilience and preparedness. These actions, collectively, can aid in creating a more effective barrier against wildfire encroachment and enhance the overall safety of the property.
